hero.question: Will Finland win Eurovision 2026?
hero.prob_take: At 36.1%, the market is pricing Finland as a genuine contender but not a favorite, which tracks given their Eurovision track record: one win in 2006 and consistent semi-final appearances, but nothing close to dominance lately. The real tell is the $1.9M volume surge and +3.4 point move in 24 hours, suggesting smart money just got bullish on specific intel about their 2026 artist or song quality that retail doesn't know yet.

trade.question: When will DHS be funded again?: Will legislation that, upon becoming law, results in the Department of Homeland Security being funded at 12:01 AM ET on the later of (i) February 14, 2026 and (ii) the calendar day after enactment become law before Apr 8, 2026?

daily_take.headline: Finland's Eurovision Dark Horse Is Suddenly Everyone's Pick
daily_take.deck: Finland jumped 3.4 points to 36.1% overnight on $1.9M volume, signaling serious money has spotted something the casuals missed. The market's pricing in a genuine contender, not a long shot. Smart bettors should ask: is this momentum play or informed edge? Watch whether the bump holds through artist announcements.
